g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the APScheduler trigger the daily scrape?')
sendPrompt('How does the manual scrape trigger work via the API?')
sendPrompt('What does run_pipeline() do step by step?')
sendPrompt('How does the holiday check work in the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does gse_scraper.py fetch and parse stock data?')
sendPrompt('What does the GSE admin-ajax endpoint return?')
sendPrompt('How does the GSE scraper parse each row of stock data?')
sendPrompt('How are parse errors logged in the GSE scraper?')
sendPrompt('How does the UNNEST bulk upsert work in repositories.py?')
sendPrompt('What tables are written to after a GSE scrape?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a successful scrape completes?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the scrape_jobs table?')
sendPrompt('What does dry_run mode do in the pipeline?')
